pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 12+ consecutive quiet polls. No substantive dome site changes since 2026-04-04. All commits automated (ECM status updates). April 5-9 reset window predictions still active.
pipeline_status.analyst: Idle (no pending expansions, no human notes). Mode 3 globe fingerprint hunt at WIN-036/67. WIN-036: Three-layer globe dependency confirmed, no novel fingerprint. EXP-015 (alternate WIN-015 version) complete but pending human comparison with already-applied EXP-013.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: Cycle 2 Phase 1 — WIN-046 reviewed (46 of 99 items). WIN-043 through WIN-046 newly completed, all clean (no holes, confidence 0.88-0.97). Added to processed-reviews ledger.
pipeline_status.integrity: PASS — 2028 tests, zero failures. Site structurally sound. 2 ScienceDirect 403s (bot-blocking, not broken links).

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes detected. 12 consecutive quiet polls. Eclipse prediction still shows -17 to -21 nT on homepage. V51.0 parameters unchanged. April 5-9 reset window expiring — watch for outcome claims in next 48h.

internal_issues.description: SEC-3.5.7 described eclipse prediction as simple single-range (-17 to -21 nT, seven stations, coverage scaling) without dual-baseline context

suggested_patch.replace: Updated to describe dual-baseline system (BOU: -5 to -12.8 nT, W004: -10.3 to -26.2 nT) across 9 stations with FSF values. Added cross-reference to Section 3.2.

internal_issues.description: Claimed to say 'applied his correction factor of 1.672' but this phrase not found in current text

suggested_patch.replace: Updated to correctly describe magnetic anomaly prediction and fix anchor reference to #eclipse-analysis.

internal_issues.description: '0.0 nT exactly' verbatim quote from dome site could not be verified

suggested_patch.replace: Changed from 'states the globe predicts 0.0 nT exactly' to 'implies the globe predicts essentially no magnetic eclipse effect'

internal_issues.description: SEC-6.2 eclipse claim about 1.672x scaling factor — already correctly identified as KAPPA in current text
Unverifiable claim that monitor.py computes specific formula; monitor.py not publicly archived

suggested_patch.replace: Added 'based on code analysis of the dome's repository' and 'appears to compute' hedging language in both occurrences. Also added KAPPA identification to part5 occurrence.

internal_issues.description: SEC-6.2 needed to explicitly acknowledge E-PRED-B as a genuine discriminating sub-test

suggested_patch.replace: Added explicit acknowledgment of E-PRED-B as genuine test, noted what confirmation would require and why standard ionospheric factors also produce the same result.

internal_issues.description: SEC-4.9 conclusion said 'undercuts at least 6 WINs' without distinguishing explicit vs implicit refraction dependence

suggested_patch.replace: Clarified to '2 explicit + 4 implicit' matching the careful distinction in the preceding paragraphs.

internal_issues.description: Verdict legend ordering was arbitrary; Self-Contradicted (strongest evidence) was buried third

suggested_patch.replace: Reordered tally: Self-Contradicted | Refuted by Data | Not Demonstrated | Std Model Explains | Misleading | Unfalsifiable

internal_issues.description: Not Demonstrated definition incomplete — missing 'adopted from external sources without dome-geometry derivation'

suggested_patch.replace: Added 'or adopted from external experimental claims without derivation from dome geometry' to definition.

internal_issues.description: SECTIONS.JSON NOT INJECTED: generate-html.js SECTIONS_AVAILABLE circular dependency — sections.json prose never injected into HTML

suggested_patch.replace: HUMAN REQUIRED: Fix SECTIONS_AVAILABLE initialization. Move the `SECTIONS_AVAILABLE = true` assignment to BEFORE the conditional check, or restructure loadSectionsCache() to be called unconditionally at startup.
